```rust
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, world!");
    let x = 42;
    for i in 0..x {
        if i % 2 == 0 {
            println!("{i} is even");
        }
    }
}
```

```python
def fibonacci(n):
    """Generate fibonacci numbers."""
    a, b = 0, 1
    for _ in range(n):
        yield a
        a, b = b, a + b
```
